message.content: The screenshot shows a pop - up about "The Great Awakening Map" (an interactive conspiracy map). There’s no chat panel open. The last message (from the pop - up) explains the map’s nature and how to read nodes, stating: “Descriptions do not endorse the claims, and they do not debunk them either — they just describe the theory as its promoters present it, neutrally. Use the links to verify, research, and draw your own conclusions.”
